description:
beads-go has 'bd dep cycles' to detect circular dependencies in the dependency graph.

Files: src/cli/mod.rs, src/cli/commands/dep.rs
title: Add bd dep cycles detection command

description:
**Problem**
beads-rs emits timestamps as \`{\"wall_ms\":1776711453290,\"counter\":1}\` (HLC WriteStamp object). Go emits RFC3339 strings: \`\"2026-04-20T18:48:58.081447Z\"\`. Gascity's \`bdIssue.CreatedAt time.Time\` (bdstore.go:298) expects RFC3339 and fails to unmarshal the object form.

Affected fields on Issue/IssueSummary: \`created_at\`, \`updated_at\`, \`closed_at\`, \`started_at\` (when added), \`assignee_at\`, \`assignee_expires\`, plus WriteStamp-shaped fields on notes/tombstones.

**Design**
Add a wire-layer serializer for WriteStamp that emits RFC3339 string. The counter dimension is DROPPED on the wire — consumers who need causality use HLC via the daemon directly. Domain model stays \`WriteStamp { wall_ms: u64, counter: u32 }\`.

Implementation: either
(a) serde newtype wrapper in beads-api that projects WriteStamp to RFC3339 on serialize, OR
(b) serde attribute + `serialize_with` fn on each WriteStamp field in Issue/IssueSummary/Note/Tombstone.

(b) is probably cleaner and less invasive.

On deserialize from RFC3339, reconstruct \`WriteStamp { wall_ms, counter: 0 }\`. This is a lossy inverse and should only happen on import paths that receive Go-shaped input; it's not a round-trip guarantee.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] \`bd show <id> --json | jq -e '.[0].created_at | fromdateiso8601'\` returns a number
- [ ] \`bd list --json | jq -e '.[0].updated_at | type'\` returns \`\"string\"\`
- [ ] Same wire change on closed_at, started_at (when present), assignee_at, assignee_expires, note timestamps, tombstone deleted_at
- [ ] HLC \`WriteStamp\` still used internally for ordering (no change to Lww merge logic)
- [ ] \`cargo xtest\` green
- [ ] \`cargo test -p beads-api\` green

**Independent of**
All other wire changes. Pure serialization edit.

**Files likely touched**
- \`crates/beads-core/src/time.rs\` — add RFC3339 serialize helper if shared
- \`crates/beads-api/src/issues.rs\`, \`crates/beads-api/src/deps.rs\`
title: Floor 0 wire: emit WriteStamp timestamps as RFC3339 strings on JSON output
